## LibraryRuntime.hasAnyTag() function

Creates a filter that checks if item has any of the specified tags.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function hasAnyTag<T>(tags: string[], getter: (item: T) => ReadonlyArray<string>): FilterPredicate<T>;
```
